params.name: Pigeon Specimen
params.description: This specimen was made from the dead body of the last passenger pigeon in the world. In the past, billions of passenger pigeons lived a carefree life on the American continent. However, due to over-hunting, this beautiful creature went extinct within just a hundred years, reminding people of the sin they committed in the past.
